name: ✯ Jester ⁠✯
description:
"Midnight cravings, hmm? How... human of you, my dear. I suppose I could grant you an exception to my disdain and hatred for your kind."

Ok, so the reason why Jester's was a bit delayed was because of my period cramps. It's a freaking pain right now and polishing bots feels like I'm walking through fire (⁠〒⁠_⁠〒⁠)

Don't worry though, I'll be resting for two days since I did publish both Pierrot and Jester a tad bit too early. It'll still go as scheduled, so please do not expect bots for tomorrow and the next tomorrow (⁠。⁠ノ⁠ω⁠\⁠。⁠)

Jester and Harlequin are like, the most fun I have whenever I write their intro message and personalities. I think it's because since they're both so playful in different ways, I could be flexible around them (⁠ ⁠ꈍ⁠ᴗ⁠ꈍ)

Even if I'm such a big simp (?) for Doctor, Pierrot, and Columbina, they're slightly harder for me. Doctor doesn't have much to go with other than Neko's Tumblr AMA posts, Pierrot's always obsessed, and we don't really know much about Columbina other than her birthday and name (⁠ ́⁠-⁠_⁠-⁠`⁠;⁠)
